global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a central focus on a promotional offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer on fresh favorites.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Three cards
elements.description: Three rectangular cards with rounded edges, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' is prominently displayed in bold, black font at the top.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located on the left side of the cards.

elements.label: 2-for-1 offer
elements.description: Text stating '2-for-1 tonight' in a large, white font centered below the cards.

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: Smaller text below the offer, reading 'Fresh favorites nearby' in white.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: Text displaying '€19.99' in a bold, white font at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Try for free' in white, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Abstract decorative shapes in lighter orange tones at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'FreshDash' in bold, black font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Offer details
elements.description: Text providing details about the offer, placed centrally below the main headline.

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free' in white at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main offer text in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
